title: Export review pack for Speculum/Kiro
goal: Create a structured review pack for Kiro/Speculum containing context, constraints, risks, Act3/Act4 refs, and targeted questions about safe Inquisition v0.1 implementation.
scope: Create review pack JSON with full context references
Create review pack MD for human readability
Include Act3 and Act4 dependency references
non_goals: Do not ingest advisory responses in this task
Do not modernize the task candidate
owner_intent: Produce a review pack that enables external reviewers to provide structured, actionable feedback on the Inquisition blueprint.
risks: Review pack may lack sufficient context for meaningful review
Questions may be too broad or too narrow
open_questions: Which specific questions yield the most actionable advisory?
Should review pack include Sanctum UI requirements?
no_fake_green_note: Review pack export does not prove advisory was received or reconciled.
